prompt_md: Your team is adopting AI assistants across the SDLC. **Select every option that is a genuine security or privacy risk, OR a sound safeguard against one** (i.e. every option that belongs in a security & privacy review of AI usage).

choices: Developers using unsanctioned chatbots with no policy or enterprise agreement — shadow AI (risk)
Pasting a production database row with customer PII into a consumer chatbot that retains prompts (risk)
Using only approved tools with zero-retention / no-train settings enabled (safeguard)
A prompt injection hidden in a fetched document that exfiltrates sensitive context (risk)
Redacting emails, addresses, and API keys before sending a stack trace to an AI tool (safeguard)
Choosing a model purely because it has the largest context window (neither a risk nor a safeguard)
